name: James Whitfield
prompt: Photorealistic headshot of a British man in his early 40s with short brown hair and light stubble, approachable expression with a slight closed-mouth smile, wearing a navy quarter-zip pullover over a collared shirt. Shot in a modern London office with floor-to-ceiling windows softly blurred in the background. Overcast natural window light from the left, soft and even with no harsh shadows. Shot on a Sony A7IV with an 85mm f/1.4 lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes. Natural skin texture with visible pores, realistic catchlights in eyes. 4K resolution, 1:1 square crop. No text, no watermark, no distortions.
